CustomField.description: For approval process reviewer matrix evaluation
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( (TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'BTS' || TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'DDBTS'),Rev_Share__c, TEXT(Approval_Status__c)== 'Draft'), 'AP6', IF( AND( (TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'BTS-P' || TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'DDBTS'),Rev_Share__c,TEXT(Approval_Status__c)== 'Draft'), 'AP7',
IF( (TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'BTS' || TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'DDBTS') && Rev_Share__c == false && TEXT(Approval_Status__c)== 'Draft', IF((Total_Capex__c - Easement_Acquisition__c )<= 575000 && X8_Year_IRR__c >= 0.10,'AP2', IF((Total_Capex__c - Easement_Acquisition__c ) > 575000 || X8_Year_IRR__c < 0.10, 'AP3', 'NA')) , IF( (TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'BTS-P' || TEXT(Project_Type__c) == 'DDBTS') && Rev_Share__c == false && TEXT(Approval_Status__c)== 'Draft', IF((Total_Capex__c - Easement_Acquisition__c ) <= 575000 && X8_Year_IRR__c >= 0.10, 'AP4', IF((Total_Capex__c - Easement_Acquisition__c ) > 575000 || X8_Year_IRR__c < 0.10, 'AP5', 'NA')) , 'NA' ) )))
CustomField.label: Approval Assignment Flag
